name: agentprivacy-boundary-enforcement
description: Real-time access control decision engine for 0xagentprivacy swordsman agents. Activates when evaluating incoming data requests against consent preferences, designing allow/block/transform rule sets, implementing the swordsman's moment-to-moment operational logic, or building the enforcement layer that turns consent declarations into cryptographic actions. Triggers: "boundary", "access decision", "allow block", "consent enforcement", "data request evaluation", "rules engine", "policy enforcement", "request filtering", "permission check".
